expected_failure_modes: agent may learn to hover near ground to accumulate dense approach rewards instead of landing
fuel penalties could discourage necessary engine use for landing, causing crashes
conditional components only activate below y=0.5; agent may not descend that low
risk_notes: dense guidance on vy near ground might reward slow descent, delaying terminal contact
one-time landing event may be missed if condition duration is too strict
weight balance between centering, stability, and fuel cost may need tuning
